questions.q: Which ubiquitous Swedish dish, often served with lingonberry jam, is a staple of the IKEA cafeteria menu?
A traditional Swedish smörgåsbord is what kind of meal?
choices: A hot-pot where everyone cooks at the table
A buffet of many small dishes
